clients.name: ContainerRegistry
clients.doc: Metadata API definition for the Azure Container Registry runtime

methods.name: check_docker_v2_support
methods.doc: Tells whether this Docker Registry instance supports Docker Registry HTTP API v2

methods.name: get_manifest
methods.doc:
Get the manifest identified by `name` and `reference` where `reference` can be
a tag or digest.

user_parameters.name: name
user_parameters.doc: Name of the image (including the namespace)

user_parameters.name: reference
user_parameters.doc: A tag or a digest, pointing to a specific image

user_parameters.name: accept
user_parameters.doc:
Accept header string delimited by comma. For example,
application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json

methods.name: create_manifest
methods.doc:
Put the manifest identified by `name` and `reference` where `reference` can be
a tag or digest.

user_parameters.name: name
user_parameters.doc: Name of the image (including the namespace)

user_parameters.name: reference
user_parameters.doc: A tag or a digest, pointing to a specific image

user_parameters.name: payload
user_parameters.doc: Manifest body, can take v1 or v2 values depending on accept header

methods.name: delete_manifest
methods.doc:
Delete the manifest identified by `name` and `reference`. Note that a manifest
can _only_ be deleted by `digest`.

user_parameters.name: name
user_parameters.doc: Name of the image (including the namespace)

user_parameters.name: reference
user_parameters.doc: Digest of a BLOB

methods.name: get_repositories
methods.doc: List repositories

user_parameters.name: last
user_parameters.doc: Query parameter for the last item in previous query. Result set will include values lexically after last.

user_parameters.name: n
user_parameters.doc: Query parameter for max number of items

methods.name: get_properties
methods.doc: Get repository attributes

user_parameters.name: name
user_parameters.doc: Name of the image (including the namespace)

methods.name: delete_repository
methods.doc: Delete the repository identified by `name`

user_parameters.name: name
user_parameters.doc: Name of the image (including the namespace)

methods.name: update_properties
methods.doc:
Update the attribute identified by `name` where `reference` is the name of the
repository.

user_parameters.name: name
user_parameters.doc: Name of the image (including the namespace)

user_parameters.name: value
user_parameters.doc: Repository attribute value

methods.name: get_tags
methods.doc: List tags of a repository

user_parameters.name: name
user_parameters.doc: Name of the image (including the namespace)

user_parameters.name: last
user_parameters.doc:
Query parameter for the last item in previous query. Result set will include
values lexically after last.

user_parameters.name: n
user_parameters.doc: query parameter for max number of items

user_parameters.name: orderby
user_parameters.doc: orderby query parameter

user_parameters.name: digest
user_parameters.doc: filter by digest

methods.name: get_tag_properties
methods.doc: Get tag attributes by tag

user_parameters.name: name
user_parameters.doc: Name of the image (including the namespace)

user_parameters.name: reference
user_parameters.doc: Tag name

methods.name: update_tag_attributes
methods.doc: Update tag attributes

user_parameters.name: name
user_parameters.doc: Name of the image (including the namespace)

user_parameters.name: reference
user_parameters.doc: Tag name

user_parameters.name: value
user_parameters.doc: Tag attribute value

methods.name: delete_tag
methods.doc: Delete tag

user_parameters.name: name
user_parameters.doc: Name of the image (including the namespace)

user_parameters.name: reference
user_parameters.doc: Tag name

methods.name: get_manifests
methods.doc: List manifests of a repository

user_parameters.name: name
user_parameters.doc: Name of the image (including the namespace)

user_parameters.name: last
user_parameters.doc:
Query parameter for the last item in previous query. Result set will include
values lexically after last.

user_parameters.name: n
user_parameters.doc: query parameter for max number of items

user_parameters.name: orderby
user_parameters.doc: orderby query parameter

methods.name: get_manifest_properties
methods.doc: Get manifest attributes

user_parameters.name: name
user_parameters.doc: Name of the image (including the namespace)

user_parameters.name: digest
user_parameters.doc: Digest of a BLOB

methods.name: update_manifest_properties
methods.doc: Update properties of a manifest

user_parameters.name: name
user_parameters.doc: Name of the image (including the namespace)

user_parameters.name: digest
user_parameters.doc: Digest of a BLOB

user_parameters.name: value
user_parameters.doc: Manifest attribute value

methods.name: get_blob
methods.doc: Retrieve the blob from the registry identified by digest.

user_parameters.name: name
user_parameters.doc: Name of the image (including the namespace)

user_parameters.name: digest
user_parameters.doc: Digest of a BLOB

methods.name: check_blob_exists
methods.doc: Same as GET, except only the headers are returned.

user_parameters.name: name
user_parameters.doc: Name of the image (including the namespace)

user_parameters.name: digest
user_parameters.doc: Digest of a BLOB

methods.name: delete_blob
methods.doc: Removes an already uploaded blob.

user_parameters.name: name
user_parameters.doc: Name of the image (including the namespace)

user_parameters.name: digest
user_parameters.doc: Digest of a BLOB

methods.name: mount_blob
methods.doc: Mount a blob identified by the `mount` parameter from another repository.

user_parameters.name: name
user_parameters.doc: Name of the image (including the namespace)

user_parameters.name: from
user_parameters.doc: Name of the source repository.

user_parameters.name: mount
user_parameters.doc: Digest of blob to mount from the source repository.

methods.name: get_upload_status
methods.doc:
Retrieve status of upload identified by uuid. The primary purpose of this
endpoint is to resolve the current status of a resumable upload.

user_parameters.name: next_blob_uuid_link
user_parameters.doc:
Link acquired from upload start or previous chunk. Note, do not include initial
/ (must do substring(1) )

methods.name: upload_chunk
methods.doc: Upload a stream of data without completing the upload.

user_parameters.name: next_blob_uuid_link
user_parameters.doc:
Link acquired from upload start or previous chunk. Note, do not include initial
/ (must do substring(1) )

user_parameters.name: value
user_parameters.doc: Raw data of blob

methods.name: complete_upload
methods.doc:
Complete the upload, providing all the data in the body, if necessary. A
request without a body will just complete the upload with previously uploaded
content.

user_parameters.name: digest
user_parameters.doc: Digest of a BLOB

user_parameters.name: next_blob_uuid_link
user_parameters.doc:
Link acquired from upload start or previous chunk. Note, do not include initial
/ (must do substring(1) )

user_parameters.name: value
user_parameters.doc: Optional raw data of blob

methods.name: cancel_upload
methods.doc:
Cancel outstanding upload processes, releasing associated resources. If this is
not called, the unfinished uploads will eventually timeout.

user_parameters.name: next_blob_uuid_link
user_parameters.doc:
Link acquired from upload start or previous chunk. Note, do not include initial
/ (must do substring(1) )

methods.name: start_upload
methods.doc: Initiate a resumable blob upload with an empty request body.

user_parameters.name: name
user_parameters.doc: Name of the image (including the namespace)

methods.name: get_chunk
methods.doc:
Retrieve the blob from the registry identified by `digest`. This endpoint may
also support RFC7233 compliant range requests. Support can be detected by
issuing a HEAD request. If the header `Accept-Range: bytes` is returned, range
requests can be used to fetch partial content.

user_parameters.name: name
user_parameters.doc: Name of the image (including the namespace)

user_parameters.name: digest
user_parameters.doc: Digest of a BLOB

user_parameters.name: range
user_parameters.doc: Format : bytes=<start>-<end>,  HTTP Range header specifying blob chunk.

methods.name: check_chunk_exists
methods.doc: Same as GET, except only the headers are returned.

user_parameters.name: name
user_parameters.doc: Name of the image (including the namespace)

user_parameters.name: digest
user_parameters.doc: Digest of a BLOB

user_parameters.name: range
user_parameters.doc: Format : bytes=<start>-<end>,  HTTP Range header specifying blob chunk.

methods.name: exchange_aad_access_token_for_acr_refresh_token
methods.doc: Exchange AAD tokens for an ACR refresh Token

user_parameters.name: body
user_parameters.doc: The body of the request

methods.name: exchange_acr_refresh_token_for_acr_access_token
methods.doc: Exchange ACR Refresh token for an ACR Access Token

user_parameters.name: body
user_parameters.doc: The body of the request

methods.name: get_acr_access_token_from_login
methods.doc: Exchange Username, Password and Scope for an ACR Access Token

user_parameters.name: service
user_parameters.doc: Indicates the name of your Azure container registry.

user_parameters.name: scope
user_parameters.doc:
Expected to be a valid scope, and can be specified more than once for multiple
scope requests. You can obtain this from the Www-Authenticate response header
from the challenge.

models.name: AcrErrors
models.doc: Acr error response describing why the operation failed

fields.name: manifests
fields.doc: (ManifestList, OCIIndex) List of V2 image layer information

fields.name: layers
fields.doc: (V2, OCI) List of V2 image layer information

models.name: ManifestListAttributes
models.doc: Attributes of a manifest in a manifest list.

fields.name: media_type
fields.doc:
The MIME type of the referenced object. This will generally be
application/vnd.docker.image.manifest.v2+json, but it could also be
application/vnd.docker.image.manifest.v1+json

fields.name: size
fields.doc: The size in bytes of the object

fields.name: digest
fields.doc: The digest of the content, as defined by the Registry V2 HTTP API Specification

fields.name: platform
fields.doc:
The platform object describes the platform which the image in the manifest runs
on. A full list of valid operating system and architecture values are listed in
the Go language documentation for $GOOS and $GOARCH

models.name: Platform
models.doc:
The platform object describes the platform which the image in the manifest runs
on. A full list of valid operating system and architecture values are listed in
the Go language documentation for $GOOS and $GOARCH

fields.name: architecture
fields.doc: Specifies the CPU architecture, for example amd64 or ppc64le.

fields.name: os
fields.doc: The os field specifies the operating system, for example linux or windows.

fields.name: os_version
fields.doc:
The optional os.version field specifies the operating system version, for
example 10.0.10586.

fields.name: os_features
fields.doc:
The optional os.features field specifies an array of strings, each listing a
required OS feature (for example on Windows win32k

fields.name: variant
fields.doc:
The optional variant field specifies a variant of the CPU, for example armv6l
to specify a particular CPU variant of the ARM CPU.

fields.name: features
fields.doc:
The optional features field specifies an array of strings, each listing a
required CPU feature (for example sse4 or aes

models.name: Descriptor
models.doc: Docker V2 image layer descriptor including config and layers

fields.name: urls
fields.doc: Specifies a list of URIs from which this object may be downloaded.

fields.name: annotations
fields.doc: Additional information provided through arbitrary metadata.

models.name: Annotations
models.doc: Additional information provided through arbitrary metadata.

fields.name: created
fields.doc:
Date and time on which the image was built (string, date-time as defined by
https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc3339#section-5.6)

fields.name: authors
fields.doc: Contact details of the people or organization responsible for the image.

fields.name: url
fields.doc: URL to find more information on the image.

fields.name: documentation
fields.doc: URL to get documentation on the image.

fields.name: source
fields.doc: URL to get source code for building the image.

fields.name: version
fields.doc:
Version of the packaged software. The version MAY match a label or tag in the
source code repository, may also be Semantic versioning-compatible

fields.name: revision
fields.doc: Source control revision identifier for the packaged software.

fields.name: vendor
fields.doc: Name of the distributing entity, organization or individual.

fields.name: licenses
fields.doc:
License(s) under which contained software is distributed as an SPDX License
Expression.

fields.name: name
fields.doc: Name of the reference for a target.

fields.name: description
fields.doc: Human-readable description of the software packaged in the image

models.name: History
models.doc: A list of unstructured historical data for v1 compatibility

fields.name: signature
fields.doc: A signature for the image manifest, signed by a libtrust private key

fields.name: alg
fields.doc: The algorithm used to sign or encrypt the JWT

fields.name: link
fields.doc: Link to the next page of results

fields.name: registry_login_server
fields.doc:
Registry login server name. This is likely to be similar to
{registry-name}.azurecr.io.

fields.name: registry_login_server
fields.doc:
Registry login server name. This is likely to be similar to
{registry-name}.azurecr.io.

fields.name: link
fields.doc: Link to the next page of results

fields.name: registry_login_server
fields.doc:
Registry login server name. This is likely to be similar to
{registry-name}.azurecr.io.

fields.name: registry_login_server
fields.doc:
Registry login server name. This is likely to be similar to
{registry-name}.azurecr.io.

fields.name: link
fields.doc: Link to the next page of results

fields.name: related_artifacts
fields.doc:
List of artifacts that are referenced by this manifest list, with information
about the platform each supports.  This list will be empty if this is a leaf
manifest and not a manifest list.

models.name: ArtifactManifestPlatform
models.doc: The artifact's platform, consisting of operating system and architecture.

fields.name: registry_login_server
fields.doc:
Registry login server name. This is likely to be similar to
{registry-name}.azurecr.io.

models.name: MultipartBodyParameter
models.doc: The multipart body parameter for AAD token exchange.

fields.name: grant_type
fields.doc:
Can take a value of access_token_refresh_token, or access_token, or
refresh_token

fields.name: service
fields.doc: Indicates the name of your Azure container registry.

fields.name: tenant
fields.doc: AAD tenant associated to the AAD credentials.

fields.name: refresh_token
fields.doc:
AAD refresh token, mandatory when grant_type is access_token_refresh_token or
refresh_token

fields.name: access_token
fields.doc:
AAD access token, mandatory when grant_type is access_token_refresh_token or
access_token.

models.name: AcrRefreshToken
models.doc: The ACR refresh token response containing the refresh token for authentication.

fields.name: refresh_token
fields.doc: The refresh token to be used for generating access tokens

models.name: AcrAccessToken
models.doc: The ACR access token response containing the access token for authentication.

fields.name: access_token
fields.doc: The access token for performing authenticated requests

enums.name: ArtifactTagOrder
enums.doc: Sort options for ordering tags in a collection.

values.name: None
values.doc: Do not provide an orderby value in the request.

values.name: LastUpdatedOnDescending
values.doc:
Order tags by LastUpdatedOn field, from most recently updated to least recently
updated.

values.name: LastUpdatedOnAscending
values.doc:
Order tags by LastUpdatedOn field, from least recently updated to most recently
updated.

enums.name: ArtifactManifestOrder
enums.doc: Sort options for ordering manifests in a collection.

values.name: None
values.doc: Do not provide an orderby value in the request.

values.name: LastUpdatedOnDescending
values.doc:
Order manifests by LastUpdatedOn field, from most recently updated to least
recently updated.

values.name: LastUpdatedOnAscending
values.doc:
Order manifest by LastUpdatedOn field, from least recently updated to most
recently updated.

enums.name: PostContentSchemaGrantType
enums.doc:
Can take a value of access_token_refresh_token, or access_token, or
refresh_token

values.name: access_token_refresh_token
values.doc: Grant type for exchanging both access token and refresh token

values.name: access_token
values.doc: Grant type for exchanging access token only

values.name: refresh_token
values.doc: Grant type for exchanging refresh token only

enums.name: TokenGrantType
enums.doc: Grant type is expected to be refresh_token

values.name: refresh_token
values.doc: Grant type for refreshing the token
